title: About Us
metaTitle: About Us | Orange Children Hospital Ahmedabad
metaDescription: Learn more about Orange Children Hospital, our state-of-the-art Level 3 NICU and PICU, our values, and our dedicated team of pediatric specialists.

content.title: Orange Children Hospital!
content.subtitle: Welcome to
points: We started the hospital in the year 2016 with the intent to provide the best child health services, with the best medical and clinical infrastructure possible. We cater to all our pediatricians and young patients across Gujarat and Rajasthan. The name Orange was simply coined, to reflect the vitality and vibrancy of the fruit 'Orange'.

The hospital was established with five of the finest and senior pediatric doctors. We have built-in "state of the art" medical infrastructure and amenities to ensure that each and every child who is admitted under our care, goes back happy, healthy, and sound. Orange specializes in neonatal and pediatric critical care. We are a 50 bedded intensive care unit, with level III NICU and PICU spread over the area of 7000 square feet.
highlights: Orange hospital also recognizes its responsibility of creating social and medical awareness which can go a long way in preventive health care. It partners with pediatricians offering O.P.D services in and around its area, conducts seminars, webinars to share, interact and transfer the continuous learning of the upcoming challenges and its solutions in the field of child diseases.

Needless to say, as a hospital we offer constant communication, services to our fellow pediatricians, so in case of emergency of their patients, we are their number one choice. We ensure proper and timely communication with our fellow pediatricians until the patient is treated successfully.

content.description: If Kids Come To Us From Strong, Healthy, Functioning Families, It Makes Our Job Easier. If They Do Not Come To Us From Strong, Healthy, Functioning Families, It Makes Our Job More Important.

content.subtitle: Our Reputation Speaks
content.title: 3 Good Reasons To Choose Orange Children Hospital
content.description: At Orange, we realize and empathize with the parents who are restless and worried. A compassionate team, which understands the responsibility at hand, is our core strength. Not only our staff members are diligent medical practitioners, but also understand the need and importance of consoling the young parents well. This happens by keeping them updated and aware of the situation at hand.

cards.title: Professional Excellence In Healthcare
cards.description: Our experienced doctors are always available to provide the best care that your child needs in every situation.

cards.title: Passion For Healing From The Core
cards.description: When it comes to healing, it's not only our profession but also our passion that helps us provide adverse child care.

cards.title: Human Touch & Latest Techniques
cards.description: To address all types of critical health care situations, we are equipped with the latest medico-surgical equipment.

cards.title: VISION
cards.description: Quality healthcare with the most affordable prices continues to be our aim.

cards.title: AIM
cards.description: Our sole aim is to provide affordable healthcare with world-class infrastructure, gadgets, and trained intensivists and staff members. We want to provide the best possible care and keep improving our results to various national and international benchmarks.

content.title: Your Child Needs Special Treatment
content.description:
It varies from people of one age group to the other. A child's treatment plan is entirely different from an adult's treatment plan. Orange hospital is enriched with every neonatal and pediatric facility to provide the best care that your child needs.

The care that a child needs in his decaying health is completely different from the other. Orange hospital understands the special needs of the little patients and is equipped with everything required to provide the best for them. Starting from primary treatment to pediatric surgery, our team of experts is here 24*7 for our little patients in need.

content.title: Best Treatment For Your Child Is Just One Call Away
